official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: NEW FISH SHADOW FORCE “I love this design. The new fish helped me solve a major hangup I was having with original fish designs - the swallowtails. I only like a swallow tail if it is built as a quad for fast...

models.manufacturer_intent: NEW FISH SHADOW FORCE “I love this design. The new fish helped me solve a major hangup I was having with original fish designs - the swallowtails. I only like a swallow tail if it is built as a quad for fast point breaks or with a tiny swallow on a twin with a trailer for mushy beach breaks. Neither of those is the best suited for today’s surfing or geared towards how I like to ride and shape surfboards. My goal when shaping is to make the experience as fun and easy as possible. Allowing you to surf better and more.“ - Corey Lopez. The NEW FISH has a clean curve through the tail and the pulled in squash is best surfed with your normal thruster setup. If you want to ride fast and free in small surf, go a size smaller with the fins. This board flies. For top speed and quickness, nothing is faster on the water than the New Fish. official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: Aloha Luna - Built for speed The Luna is Aloha’s modern take on the small wave fish—fast, loose, and built to fly. Designed with low rocker and full rail volume, it paddles easy, picks up speed fast, and holds momentum through even...

models.manufacturer_intent: Aloha Luna - Built for speed The Luna is Aloha’s modern take on the small wave fish—fast, loose, and built to fly. Designed with low rocker and full rail volume, it paddles easy, picks up speed fast, and holds momentum through even the weakest sections. Underneath, a single to deep double concave bottom channels water through the board for lift and drive, while the quad fin setup adds control and release. Compact and playful, the Luna is made for surfers who want to have fun and go fast when the waves are anything but perfect. Length x Width x Thickness = Volume: 5'4 x 20 5/8 x 2 71/6 28.74L 5'6 x 21 1/4 x 2 1/2 31.35L 5'8 x 21 15/16 x 2 9/16 34.26L 5'10 x 22 x 2 11/16 36.87L Shadow Force is Aloha’s advanced epoxy construction , designed to deliver traditional flex, feel but with extra pop and durability. Built around a lightweight 36g EPS core with a 20mm PVC stringer for added strength and controlled flex, the board is laminated using low-VOC epoxy resin. The result is a responsive, high-performance ride that feels familiar but offers more speed, spark, and projection through turns. Strong, lively, and built to las. official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: Aloha Skipper - High volume performance. The Skipper’s built to handle just about anything you throw at it. With a fuller outline, lower entry rocker, and forward wide point, it paddles like a dream and gets you into waves early. The rails...

models.manufacturer_intent: Aloha Skipper - High volume performance. The Skipper’s built to handle just about anything you throw at it. With a fuller outline, lower entry rocker, and forward wide point, it paddles like a dream and gets you into waves early. The rails are full and forgiving, blending into a foiled round pin tail that gives you hold and flow when it matters. It’s super user-friendly but still performs when the waves turn on. Run it as a thruster for your everyday surf, or switch it to a quad when things get a little more hollow or punchy. If you’re after one board that does a bit of everything — this is it. official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: Aloha Wingman — Fast, Loose & Made to Fly The Wingman is designed for smooth, fast surfing in knee- to shoulder-high waves. It’s all about effortless speed, tight turns, and flow—ideal for playful conditions or wave pools. The single wing swallow tail...

models.manufacturer_intent: Aloha Wingman — Fast, Loose & Made to Fly The Wingman is designed for smooth, fast surfing in knee- to shoulder-high waves. It’s all about effortless speed, tight turns, and flow—ideal for playful conditions or wave pools. The single wing swallow tail and twin + stabiliser setup give it the perfect mix of looseness, drive, and control. With medium rails and a single-to-double concave, it stays quick and responsive while carving or cruising. A great option for intermediate to advanced surfers looking for more performance in smaller surf. official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: Aloha x Lopez H2 — Shadow Force Construction The H2, like all my boards, started with a simple goal—make something my friends could ride and have more fun on. That’s always been the heart of it for me: building boards that feel...

models.manufacturer_intent: Aloha x Lopez H2 — Shadow Force Construction The H2, like all my boards, started with a simple goal—make something my friends could ride and have more fun on. That’s always been the heart of it for me: building boards that feel good and make average days feel special. I shaped the H2 to fly across flat sections, with a low rocker and a fuller outline up front that picks up speed quickly and keeps momentum flowing. The tail pulls in with a touch more rocker and a rounded squash, letting you stay loose and in control through steeper sections. It’s easy to ride, super responsive, and smooth through turns. Whether you're pushing progression or just out for a fun session, the H2 delivers. By Corey Lopez. official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: Aloha EZ MID EcoSkin – Smooth Trim, Effortless Style & Eco-Minded Construction The EZ MID EcoSkin is your answer to easy-riding mid-length flow, combining smooth lines with eco-friendly materials. With classic trim speed, clean turns, and sustainable construction, it’s the board for...

models.manufacturer_intent: Aloha EZ MID EcoSkin – Smooth Trim, Effortless Style & Eco-Minded Construction The EZ MID EcoSkin is your answer to easy-riding mid-length flow, combining smooth lines with eco-friendly materials. With classic trim speed, clean turns, and sustainable construction, it’s the board for anyone who loves style, simplicity, and glide—without the bulk or environmental impact. Why Choose the EZ MID EcoSkin? • Designed for easy cruising with clean, classic lines—delivers pure trim speed and flowing rail-to-rail transitions • Medium rocker boosts paddle power and keeps turning lively and precise, so you can catch more waves and link turns with ease • Single to double concave bottom with slight vee through the tail generates lift, speed, and buttery smooth transitions • Centred wide point adds stability and reduces swing weight in the nose, offering a balanced, controlled feel in all conditions • Ride as a single fin for classic glide, or add side bites in bigger or steeper surf for more hold and control • Constructed using Aloha’s EcoSkin tech—sustainably sourced Paulownia wood, bio-based epoxy resin, and minimised waste for strength, flex, and reduced carbon footprint Sizing and Volumes • 6’6” x 20 3/4” x 2 5/8” (38.94L) • 7’0” x 21 1/8” x 2 3/4” (44.27L) • 7’6” x 21 3/4” x 2 7/8” (51.13L) Key Specs • Material: EPS/Epoxy/Fiberglass with Paulownia skin, bio-based epoxy • Glassing: 200g + Paulownia skin + 160g cloth • Rocker: High/medium for paddle and response • Rails: Medium/full for stability and forgiveness • Fin system: Single box with Futures side bites (2+1 or single) Benefits • Smooth, easy paddling and effortless catching of waves—perfect for classic surf style • Stable and intuitive ride, without beginner-level bulk or sluggishness • Versatile fin setup for tailored feel—classic single or extra bite for punchier conditions • Eco-conscious construction for surfers who want a lighter footprint with high durability • Ideal board for those wanting simple elegance and functional glide across all conditions Who’s it For? • Beginners and intermediates wanting an easy, confidence-building mid-length • Advanced riders seeking trim speed, glide, and classic lines in a greener package • Surfers who value timeless style, fuss-free design, and reduced environmental impact The Aloha EZ MID EcoSkin makes every session smoother—delivering classic lines, effortless speed, and true sustainability for the mindful modern surfer. The Aloha EZ MID Ecoskin — Smooth lines, Eco-friendly The EZ MID is built for surfers who want an easy to ride longer board without the bulky feel. It’s all about clean lines, trim speed, and flowing turns—ideal for surfers who appreciate style and simplicity. Designed with a medium rocker for increased paddle power and manoeuvrability, the EZ MID features a single to double concave with a slight vee through the tail. The bottom contour helps generate speed, lift and smooth transitions, The wide point is centered for stability and reduced swing weight up front. Ride it as a single fin for classic flow or add side bites for extra control in steeper conditions Length x Width x Thickness = Volume: 6’6“ X 20 3/4“ X 2 5/8 38.94L 7'0 x 21 1/8 x 2 3/4 44.27L 7'6 x 21 3/4 x 2 7/8 51.13L Ecoskin is Aloha’s eco-conscious construction , engineered to reduce environmental impact while delivering the strength, speed, and responsiveness you expect from a performance board, and the construction process significantly minimises waste. Sustainably sourced Paulownia wood adds natural strength and flex, while a bio-based epoxy resin replaces traditional petroleum-based options—reducing the board’s carbon footprint without compromising durability. Lightweight, tough, and made to last, Ecoskin boards are a smarter choice for surfers who care about the planet and their performance. Features: Material: EPS/Epoxy/Fiberglass Glassing: 200gram + Paulonia Skin + 160gram Cloth Rocker: High/medium Rails: Medium/full Fin System: Single box + Futures

official_evidence.official_intent_excerpt: Aloha Jalapeno - Best selling Shortboard The Jalapeno is a high-performance all-rounder built for surfers who want one board that can handle it all. Whether you're surfing 2-4 foot beach breaks, tackling overhead hollow waves, or dialing in your turns at a...

models.manufacturer_intent: Aloha Jalapeno - Best selling Shortboard The Jalapeno is a high-performance all-rounder built for surfers who want one board that can handle it all. Whether you're surfing 2-4 foot beach breaks, tackling overhead hollow waves, or dialing in your turns at a wave pool, this board delivers speed, control, and adaptability—making it our best-selling shortboard of all time. With a wide, curvy outline, the Jalapeno offers extra stability and effortless speed. A single-to-double concave, slight vee in the tail, wider nose, and lower entry rocker provide excellent paddle power and quick acceleration, ensuring you're always in the right spot at the right time. The versatile 5-fin setup gives you options — ride it as a thruster for pivot and release or as a quad for extra drive and speed.
